opportunities.specific_product: Tufted dorm bed headboard cushion (bed rail pillow)
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turn a $39 bed rail cushion into a dorm room daybed glow-up
opportunities.before_state: Bare metal twin XL dorm bed frame, exposed headboard rail against a cinderblock wall
opportunities.after_state: Padded tufted headboard cushion instantly turns the bed into a cozy daybed/lounge look
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's pin feed is dominated by dorm setup content right now, matching the mid-July run-up to August move-in when parents/students actively shop.

opportunities.specific_product: Sage green velvet blackout curtain panels
opportunities.transformation_hook: $32 velvet curtains block the sun for better sleep before early classes
opportunities.before_state: Bare dorm/bedroom window with cheap mini blinds letting in harsh morning light
opportunities.after_state: Rich sage green velvet blackout panels frame the window with a sophisticated, cozy look
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy called out this exact product (sage velvet, blackout, early-class sleep angle) as a top back-to-school dorm pin this week.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch couch cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $47 stretch cover erases pet hair and stains on a worn couch in minutes
opportunities.before_state: Faded, stained couch covered in visible pet hair and wear
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, tailored-looking slipcover that reads as a brand-new sofa
opportunities.why_now: Evergreen high-converting transformation category with the highest affiliate commission in our portfolio (24-30%); no seasonal dip, so it's a reliable slot regardless of daily trend noise.

opportunities.specific_product: Sliding barn door hardware + door kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: $110 barn door kit swaps a boring hollow door for rustic character
opportunities.before_state: Plain white hollow-core interior door or exposed open closet opening
opportunities.after_state: Rustic sliding barn door on black hardware rail adds farmhouse character to the room
opportunities.why_now: HGTV is actively pushing sliding barn doors as a trending character-adding feature in its publisher feed this week.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $24 gold vanity mirror fixes a cramped, mirror-less dorm desk setup
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered, cramped dorm desk or bathroom counter with no mirror or styling space
opportunities.after_state: Sleek gold easel vanity mirror creates a mini get-ready station in minimal space
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy specifically featured this compact gold mirror for dorm desks as part of the current back-to-school prep wave.
